homepage.heroSubline: Wills Excavating delivers dependable excavation services across Indianapolis. Site prep to demolition—we handle it all.
aboutText: Wills Excavating started with a single backhoe and a commitment to doing things the right way. For over a decade, we've built a reputation in Indianapolis for reliable excavation services, clear communication, and fair pricing.

Our approach is simple: understand the project, plan meticulously, and execute flawlessly. We value safety, precision, and exceeding expectations, regardless of project size. Indianapolis's tricky clay soil and unpredictable weather demand experience—we've got it.

We're deeply rooted in the Indianapolis community. From supporting local youth sports to partnering with area contractors, we believe in giving back to the city that's given us so much. Wills Excavating is committed to building a better Indianapolis, one project at a time.

valueProps.title: Experienced Operators
valueProps.description: Our team knows Indianapolis soil conditions and drainage like the back of their hand.

valueProps.title: Reliable Equipment
valueProps.description: We maintain a modern fleet, ensuring projects stay on schedule and within budget.

valueProps.title: Safety Focused
valueProps.description: Safety isn't just a rule, it's our top priority on every job site, protecting our crew and your property.

valueProps.title: Clear Communication
valueProps.description: We keep you informed every step of the way, from initial estimate to project completion.

homepage.ctaSubline: Get a free, no-obligation quote for your Indianapolis-area excavation needs. Call now!

services.name: Site Preparation
services.shortDescription: Laying the groundwork for successful construction projects in Indianapolis.
services.description:
Proper site preparation is critical for any construction project's success. In Indianapolis, with its varying soil conditions and seasonal freeze-thaw cycles, this is especially true. Wills Excavating provides comprehensive site preparation services, starting with thorough site clearing to remove trees, debris, and any existing structures. We then perform precise grading and leveling to ensure proper drainage, crucial for preventing water damage in Indianapolis's wet seasons. 

Our team also handles soil stabilization using techniques tailored to the specific soil composition of your site. We use compaction methods to create a solid base for foundations, driveways, or parking lots. We understand the unique challenges posed by Indianapolis's clay-rich soil and implement strategies to mitigate potential issues like settling or shifting. From small residential projects to large commercial developments, Wills Excavating ensures your site is perfectly prepared for construction, saving you time and money in the long run.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment & Planning. We evaluate the site's soil, topography, and environmental factors.
Step 2: Clearing & Grubbing. Removing trees, vegetation, and debris to create a clean work area.
Step 3: Grading & Leveling. Achieving proper elevations and drainage to prevent water accumulation.
Step 4: Soil Stabilization. Compacting and treating the soil to provide a stable base for construction.
benefits: Ensures proper drainage to avoid water damage
Creates a stable base for construction
Reduces the risk of settling or shifting

faq.question: Why is site preparation so important in Indianapolis?
faq.answer: Indianapolis's clay soil expands and contracts with moisture changes, leading to potential foundation problems if the site isn't properly prepared. Our freeze-thaw cycles also add to this risk.

faq.question: Do you handle environmental concerns during site preparation?
faq.answer: Yes, we adhere to all local and federal environmental regulations. We can manage erosion control, sediment control, and proper disposal of any hazardous materials discovered on-site.

faq.question: How long does site preparation typically take?
faq.answer: The duration varies depending on the size and complexity of the project. However, we provide a detailed timeline during the initial consultation and keep you informed throughout the process.

services.name: Foundation Excavation
services.shortDescription: Expert foundation excavation services for residential and commercial buildings.
services.description:
A solid foundation starts with precise excavation. Wills Excavating provides expert foundation excavation services for residential and commercial projects across Indianapolis. We understand the importance of accurate measurements, proper depth, and stable soil conditions to ensure a long-lasting foundation. Our team uses advanced equipment and techniques to excavate according to your building plans, taking into account the specific soil composition and drainage requirements of your site. We carefully remove soil, level the base, and prepare the site for concrete pouring or foundation construction.

We also handle backfilling and compaction around the foundation to provide additional support and prevent water infiltration. With years of experience in Indianapolis, we're familiar with the challenges posed by our local soil conditions and implement strategies to mitigate potential problems. Whether you're building a new home in Carmel, a commercial building in Fishers, or an addition in Noblesville, Wills Excavating ensures your foundation is built on a solid, reliable base.
process: Step 1: Layout & Marking. Accurately marking the excavation area according to the building plans.
Step 2: Excavation. Removing soil to the required depth and dimensions, ensuring proper slopes.
Step 3: Leveling & Compaction. Leveling the base of the excavation and compacting the soil for stability.
Step 4: Backfilling & Grading. Backfilling around the foundation and grading the surrounding area for drainage.
benefits: Ensures a stable and level foundation
Reduces the risk of water damage

faq.question: How deep do you typically excavate for a foundation?
faq.answer: The depth depends on the building plans and local building codes. We follow the engineer's specifications to ensure the foundation is properly supported.

faq.question: What type of equipment do you use for foundation excavation?
faq.answer: We use a variety of excavators, backhoes, and skid steers, depending on the size and complexity of the project. All our equipment is well-maintained and operated by experienced professionals.

faq.question: How do you handle groundwater during excavation?
faq.answer: We can implement dewatering techniques, such as sump pumps or well points, to remove groundwater and keep the excavation site dry.

services.name: Demolition Services
services.shortDescription: Safe and efficient demolition services for residential and commercial structures.
services.description:
Wills Excavating provides safe and efficient demolition services for residential and commercial structures throughout Indianapolis. We handle everything from small-scale demolitions, such as removing sheds or garages, to larger projects involving houses or commercial buildings. Our team follows strict safety protocols and uses specialized equipment to ensure the demolition process is completed safely and efficiently. We prioritize minimizing dust, noise, and disruption to the surrounding environment.

We also handle debris removal and site cleanup, leaving your property clean and ready for the next phase of development. Wills Excavating is licensed and insured to perform demolition work in Indianapolis, and we comply with all local and federal regulations. We assess each project individually to determine the best demolition method, whether it's mechanical demolition with excavators or a more controlled, selective demolition approach. Trust us to handle your demolition project with professionalism and care.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment & Permitting. Evaluating the structure and obtaining necessary permits.
Step 2: Utility Disconnection. Disconnecting all utilities to ensure safety during demolition.
Step 3: Demolition. Carefully demolishing the structure using appropriate equipment and techniques.
Step 4: Debris Removal & Cleanup. Removing all debris and cleaning the site to prepare for new construction.
benefits: Leaves the site clean and ready for redevelopment

faq.question: Do I need a permit for demolition in Indianapolis?
faq.answer: Yes, a demolition permit is typically required. We can assist you with the permitting process.

faq.question: How do you handle hazardous materials during demolition?
faq.answer: We have trained professionals who can identify and safely remove hazardous materials, such as asbestos or lead paint, according to EPA regulations.

faq.question: What happens to the debris after demolition?
faq.answer: We recycle as much debris as possible and dispose of the remaining materials at licensed landfills.

services.name: Land Clearing
services.shortDescription: Clearing land for construction, development, or agricultural purposes.
services.description:
Wills Excavating offers comprehensive land clearing services for residential, commercial, and agricultural properties in Indianapolis and the surrounding areas. Whether you're preparing land for a new construction project, creating a pasture, or expanding your agricultural operations, we have the expertise and equipment to get the job done efficiently. Our land clearing services include tree removal, brush clearing, stump grinding, and debris removal. We use environmentally responsible methods to minimize soil erosion and protect surrounding vegetation.

We also offer grading and leveling services to prepare the land for its intended use. Wills Excavating understands the importance of proper planning and execution when it comes to land clearing. We work closely with our clients to ensure their specific needs are met and the project is completed on time and within budget. From small residential lots to large commercial properties, we have the experience and resources to handle any land clearing project.
process: Step 1: Site Evaluation & Planning. Assessing the land and developing a clearing plan.
Step 2: Tree Removal & Brush Clearing. Removing trees, brush, and vegetation.
Step 3: Stump Grinding. Grinding stumps below ground level to prevent regrowth.
Step 4: Debris Removal & Grading. Removing debris and grading the land for its intended use.
benefits: Prepares land for construction or development

faq.question: What is the best time of year for land clearing in Indianapolis?
faq.answer: Land clearing can be done year-round, but the fall and winter months are often preferred due to less vegetation growth and drier ground conditions.

faq.question: Do I need a permit for land clearing?
faq.answer: Permit requirements vary depending on the size and location of the project. We can help you determine if a permit is needed and assist with the application process.

faq.question: How do you protect the environment during land clearing?
faq.answer: We use erosion control measures, such as silt fences and hay bales, to prevent soil erosion and protect waterways. We also minimize the use of heavy equipment to reduce soil compaction.

services.name: Drainage Solutions
services.shortDescription: Solving drainage problems to protect your property from water damage.
services.description:
Excess water can cause significant damage to your property, leading to foundation problems, soil erosion, and landscaping issues. Wills Excavating provides effective drainage solutions to protect your Indianapolis property from water damage. We offer a range of drainage services, including French drains, surface drains, and grading adjustments. Our team assesses your property's drainage issues and designs a customized solution to effectively manage water runoff.

We use high-quality materials and proven techniques to ensure long-lasting results. Wills Excavating understands the importance of proper drainage in Indianapolis, with its heavy rainfall and clay soil. We take into account the local climate and soil conditions when designing and installing drainage systems. Whether you're experiencing standing water in your yard, water infiltration into your basement, or erosion problems, we can provide a solution to keep your property dry and protected.
process: Step 1: Site Assessment & Diagnosis. Identifying the source of the drainage problem.
Step 2: System Design. Designing a customized drainage solution.
Step 3: Installation. Installing the drainage system using high-quality materials.
Step 4: Testing & Adjustment. Testing the system to ensure it is functioning properly.
benefits: Prevents water damage to your property

faq.question: What is a French drain?
faq.answer: A French drain is a trench filled with gravel or rock that contains a perforated pipe. It is used to redirect surface and groundwater away from a specific area.

faq.question: How do I know if I need a drainage system?
faq.answer: Signs that you may need a drainage system include standing water in your yard, water infiltration into your basement, soil erosion, and foundation cracks.

faq.question: How much does it cost to install a drainage system?
faq.answer: The cost depends on the complexity of the project and the type of drainage system installed. We provide free estimates to help you understand the cost involved.

services.name: Utility Trenching
services.shortDescription: Safe and precise trenching for utility installations and repairs.
services.description:
Wills Excavating provides safe and precise utility trenching services for residential and commercial projects in Indianapolis. We handle trenching for a variety of utilities, including water lines, sewer lines, gas lines, and electrical conduits. Our team is experienced in working around existing utilities and follows strict safety protocols to prevent damage. We use specialized equipment to excavate trenches to the required depth and width, ensuring proper slope and compaction.

We also handle backfilling and compaction after the utility installation is complete. Wills Excavating understands the importance of accurate trenching for utility installations. We work closely with utility companies and contractors to ensure the trenches are dug according to their specifications. Whether you're installing new utilities or repairing existing ones, we can provide reliable and efficient trenching services.
process: Step 1: Utility Location & Marking. Locating and marking existing utilities to prevent damage.
Step 2: Trench Excavation. Excavating the trench to the required depth and width.
Step 3: Utility Installation. Installing the utility lines or conduits.
Step 4: Backfilling & Compaction. Backfilling the trench and compacting the soil.

faq.question: Do you locate utilities before trenching?
faq.answer: Yes, we always contact the Indiana 811 service to locate and mark existing utilities before starting any excavation work. This is a critical safety measure to prevent damage to underground lines.

faq.question: What type of equipment do you use for utility trenching?
faq.answer: We use a variety of excavators, trenchers, and backhoes, depending on the size and complexity of the project.

faq.question: How deep do you typically trench for utilities?
faq.answer: The depth depends on the type of utility and local regulations. We follow the utility company's specifications to ensure the trench is dug to the proper depth.

Known for its upscale developments built primarily between the 1980s and 2000s, Carmel presents unique excavation needs, from preparing building sites for new luxury homes to addressing drainage issues in established neighborhoods. We understand the specific requirements of working in this community and are committed to providing top-quality workmanship with minimal disruption. 

Our team is experienced in handling projects of all sizes in Carmel, from residential landscaping and foundation work to commercial site development. We are fully licensed and insured, and we adhere to all local regulations and building codes. Whether you're planning a new construction project or need assistance with an existing property, Wills Excavating is here to help.

reviews.name: Sarah M.
reviews.text: Wills Excavating did an outstanding job with the foundation excavation for our new home in Broad Ripple. They were punctual, professional, and very careful to ensure everything was done to the exact specifications. The team was knowledgeable about the soil conditions and drainage requirements, which gave us peace of mind. Highly recommend!

reviews.name: John K.
reviews.text: I hired Wills Excavating for site preparation on a commercial project near the Indianapolis Motor Speedway. They cleared the land quickly and efficiently. There were some minor delays due to weather, but they communicated proactively and kept the project moving. Overall, very satisfied with their work.

reviews.name: Emily R.
reviews.text: Wills Excavating provided demolition services for an old garage on my property. The team was professional, efficient, and took great care to protect the surrounding landscape. They cleaned up the site thoroughly and left it ready for new construction. I wouldn't hesitate to use them again.

reviews.name: David L.
reviews.text: We had serious drainage problems in our backyard, leading to standing water and mosquito issues. Wills Excavating installed a French drain system that completely solved the problem. They were prompt, courteous, and explained everything clearly. Our yard is now usable again!

reviews.name: Jessica P.
reviews.text: Wills Excavating handled the utility trenching for our new water line. They were very careful to avoid damaging any existing utilities and completed the work quickly. There was a slight miscommunication about the project timeline, but they resolved it promptly. Good service overall.

reviews.name: Brian T.
reviews.text: Wills Excavating did a fantastic job clearing our land for a new barn. They removed all the trees and brush efficiently, and they were very respectful of the environment. The site was left perfectly level and ready for construction. Highly recommended!
